title: dissomeria glanduligera
intro: Dissomeria glanduligera is a plant species belonging to the family Gentianaceae, native to the Himalayan region. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to provide health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and supporting digestive health. Dissomeria glanduligera is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and it can also be used in the form of a tincture or powder for various herbal remedies.
